texto: There is risk, known and unknown, in all aspects of life. We often consider the loss of life the only serious risk. Unless we are genuinely aware, we calculate the danger arising from our own physical and emotional states and from external conditions based on incomplete information. If we believe we can manage those risks, we accept them. Whether these choices are born of delusion or reality comes out in the end.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Twight sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There is risk, known and unknown, in all aspects of life. We often consider the loss of life the …” articula reflexao, complexity, personal-development em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e luto.

texto: We may train ourselves to be adaptable as possible, to respond appropriately in each situation, but the ideal of controlling the outcome or steering events as they occur must be relinquished. Chaos rules it all.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mark Twight sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We may train ourselves to be adaptable as possible, to respond appropriately in each situation, b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, chaos, complexity, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e complexity.

texto: Live the lifestyle instead of paying lip service to the lifesytle. Live with commitment. With emotional content. Live whatever life you choose honestly. Give up this renaissance man, dilettante bullshit of doing a lot of different things (and none of them very well by real standards). Get to the guts of one thing; accept, without casuistry, the responsability of making a choice.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Twight sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Live the lifestyle instead of paying lip service to the lifesytle. Live with commitment. With emo…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, kick-ass em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e kick-ass.

texto: If you can not grasp the consciousness-altering experience that real mastery of these disciplines proposes, of what value is your participation?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Twight que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “If you can not grasp the consciousness-altering experience that real mastery of these disciplines…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, kick-ass, personal-development, com foco em personal-development e point-blank.
